questionText: Are you a signatory or member of any environmental collaborative frameworks or initiatives?
questionKo: 서명기관 ( signatory) 또는 회원으로 있는 환경이슈와 관련된 협력 프레임워크 또는 이니셔티브에 대해 설명 하십시오 .
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Plastics, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Biodiversity - Mines, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: By becoming a signatory of environmental collaborative industry initiatives, organizations contribute to the development of environmental disclosure frameworks, metrics, and goals that will help transition into a more sustainable economy. Supporting environmental industry initiatives sends a signal to investors about the organization's commitment to taking steps to align its business with this transition. Endorsing widely known public initiatives reflects good practice and meets data users' demand for environmental action, as organizations have the opportunity to benchmark themselves against their peers.

columns.text: Are you a signatory or member of any environmental collaborative frameworks or initiatives?
options: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to within the next two years
columns.textKo: Are you a signatory 또는 member of 하나 이상 environmental collaborative frameworks 또는 이니셔티브?
optionsKo: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to within the next two years

options: Apparel and Footwear International RSL Management AFIRM Group
Asia Investor Group on Climate Change (AIGCC)
Glasgow Financial Alliance for Net Zero (GFANZ)
Global Alliance for Banking on Values (GABV)
Global Initiative for Nature, Grids, and Renewables (GINGR)
High Carbon Stock Approach Steering Group
IIF Forum on Implementation of TCFD recommendations
Industry Task Team on Climate Change
Institutional Investors Group on Climate Change (IIGCC)
International Association of Oil and Gas Producers (IOGP)
International Council on Mining and Metals (ICMM)
Net Zero Financial Service Providers Alliance
Sustainable Districts Association (Lingkar Temu Kabupaten Lestari)
Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD)
Task Force on Nature-related Financial Disclosures (TNFD)
UNEP FI Principles for Responsible Banking
UNEP FI Principles for Sustainable Insurance
UNEP FI's Climate Risk and TCFD programme
Water Action Hub (by CEO Water Mandate)
World Business Council for Sustainable Development (WBCSD)

columns.text: Describe your organization's role within each framework or initiative
columns.textKo: 귀사의 role within each framework 또는 이니셔티브을/를 설명하십시오.

guidance.text: Additional guidance; New question for Ocean
guidance.textKo: Additional guidance; New 문항 for Ocean

guidance.text:
General 
This question collects information on whether an organization is a signatory or member of frameworks, forums, pledges, coalitions, roundtables, and other types of industry initiatives with the aim of contributing to a transition into a more sustainable economy.
Note that the focus of this question is industry engagement - public policy engagement and granular landscape/jurisdictional initiatives are covered in other parts of the CDP questionnaire.
Collaborative framework or initiative (column 2) 
This column only appears if you select "Yes" in column 1 "Are you a signatory or member of any environmental collaborative frameworks or initiatives?".
Note: Regarding frameworks and initiatives that are also certification schemes e.g., "Roundtable on Sustainable Soy", only select those for which you are a member or signatory. Do not select certification schemes that you source if you are not a member or signatory
. 
Describe your organization's role within each framework or initiative (column 3) 
This column only appears if you select "Yes" in column 1 "Are you a signatory or member of any environmental collaborative frameworks or initiatives?".
Provide additional information on your organization's role in each of the selected frameworks/initiatives. Include examples, if applicable.
If you selected ‘Other, please specify' in column "Collaborative framework or initiative", briefly describe the specified framework/initiative.
guidance.textKo: 일반 This 문항 collects information on whether an organization is a signatory 또는 member of frameworks, forums, pledges, coalitions, roundtables, 및 other types of industry 이니셔티브 with the aim of contributing to a transition into a more sustainable economy. Note that the focus of this 문항 is industry engagement - public 정책 engagement 및 granular landscape/jurisdictional 이니셔티브 are covered in other parts 의 CDP questionnaire. Collaborative framework 또는 이니셔티브 (열 2) This 열 only appears 만약 you select "예" in 열 1 "Are you a signatory 또는 member of 하나 이상 environmental collaborative frameworks 또는 이니셔티브?". Note: Regarding frameworks 및 이니셔티브 that are also certification schemes e.g., "Roundtable on Sustainable Soy", only select those for which you are a member 또는 signatory. Do not select certification schemes that you source 만약 you are not a member 또는 signatory . 설명 귀사의 role within each framework 또는 이니셔티브 (열 3) This 열 only appears 만약 you select "예" in 열 1 "Are you a signatory 또는 member of 하나 이상 environmental collaborative frameworks 또는 이니셔티브?". Provide additional information on 귀사의 role in each 의 선택 frameworks/이니셔티브. Include examples, 만약 해당되는 경우. 만약 you 선택 ‘Other, 직접 입력' in 열 "Collaborative framework 또는 이니셔티브", briefly 설명 the specified framework/이니셔티브.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Are you a signatory or member…' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, but we plan to…' selected in column 'Are you a signatory or member…' - 0.5/1 points
A maximum of 0.5/1 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: Awareness 점수를 획득하려면 Disclosure에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 경로 A) '예' 선택 in 열 'Are you a signatory 또는 member…' - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'No, but we plan to…' 선택 in 열 'Are you a signatory 또는 member…' - 0.5/1 점 A 최고 of 0.5/1 점 is available for this 경로.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Collaborative framework or initiative' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Management 점수를 획득하려면 Awareness에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Collaborative framework 또는 이니셔티브' - 1 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.

change.question_ko: 서명기관 ( signatory) 또는 회원으로 있는 환경이슈와 관련된 협력 프레임워크 또는 이니셔티브에 대해 설명 하십시오 . M4. Governance 1 2 3 환경 협력 프레임워크 또는 이니셔티브의 서명기관 또는 회원 여부 참여한 협업 프레임워크 또는 이니셔티브 각 프레임워크 또는 이니셔티브 내에서 조직의 역할 설명 선택 항목 : 예 아니요 , 하지만 향후 2 년 이내에 참여할 계획임 아니요 , 향후 2 년 이내에 참여할 계획 없음 아래 드롭다운 목록에서 해당하는 항목 모두 선택 : 텍스트 입력 [ 최대 5,000 자 ]
change.q2025_text: Are you a signatory or member of any environmental collaborative frameworks or initiatives?
change.change_status: Additional guidance; new question for Ocean
change.change_summary:
Added guidance to clarify what type of 'Collaborative Framework & Initiative' can be disclosed.
Dropdown options added for 'Oil & Gas', 'Plastics' and 'Ocean' disclosure. Removed dropdown option "Science-based targets"
change.daml_summary: General: D 1/1 | A 0.5 or 1/1 | M 1/1 | L 0/0
change.reflected:
2026 question text applied
2026 response type/columns applied
2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked
change.change_summaryKo: Added guidance to clarify what type of 'Collaborative Framework & 이니셔티브' can be 공개. Dropdown options added for 'Oil & Gas', 'Plastics' 및 'Ocean' disclosure. Removed dropdown option "Science-based 목표"
change.reflectedKo:
2026 문항명 반영
2026 응답 유형/열 구조 반영
2026 D/A/M/L 평가 배점 연결
2026 평가방법론 연결
2025 대비 2026 변경요약 연결
change.q2025_textKo: Are you a signatory 또는 member of 하나 이상 environmental collaborative frameworks 또는 이니셔티브?

sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, Biodiversity - Mines, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: By becoming a signatory of environmental collaborative industry 이니셔티브, organizations contribute to the development of environmental disclosure frameworks, metrics, 및 goals that will help transition into a more sustainable economy. Supporting environmental industry 이니셔티브 sends a signal to investors about the 조직의 commitment to taking steps to align its business with this transition. Endorsing widely known public 이니셔티브 reflects good practice 및 meets 데이터 사용자' demand for environmental action, as organizations have the opportunity to benchmark themselves against their peers.
